finder.statusBarDesc: Show item count and disk space

keyboard.title: Keyboard

privacy.title: Privacy Permissions
privacy.description: View and reset app permissions for Camera, Microphone, Screen Recording, and Full Disk Access.
privacy.gatekeeperDesc: Control which apps are allowed to run on your Mac.
privacy.gatekeeperReadonly: This setting can only be changed in System Settings. macOS uses a private API.
privacy.resetPrompt: Enter bundle ID to reset {{label}} permission for:

login.title: Login Items
login.removeConfirmDescription: Remove "{{name}}" from login items? It will no longer launch at login.
login.removeConsequence: This only removes the login item entry. The app itself is not deleted.

actions.title: Quick Actions
actions.rebootConfirm: Are you sure you want to reboot?
actions.shutdownConfirm: Are you sure you want to shutdown?
actions.lockPasswordDesc: Require password immediately when waking from sleep
actions.warning: The following operations are irreversible. Use with caution.
actions.emptyTrashConfirmDescription: Permanently delete all items in the Trash.
actions.emptyTrashConsequence: Deleted files cannot be recovered from the Trash.
actions.rebootConsequence: Unsaved work in other apps may be lost.
actions.shutdownConsequence: Unsaved work in other apps may be lost.

toggles.title: System Toggles
toggles.autohideMenuBarDesc: Control the auto-hide behavior of the menu bar
toggles.dockShowRecentsDesc: Display recently used apps in Dock
toggles.hideDesktopIconsDesc: Hide all icons on the desktop

diagnostics.title: Network Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Ping target hosts, check local IP and WiFi information.

browser.title: Default Browser
browser.loadFailed: Failed to read default browser setting

shortcuts.title: System Settings Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Click to open the corresponding macOS System Settings panel.

accountManager.deleteStationDesc: Delete "{{name}}"? All accounts under it and their data will also be removed.
accountManager.deleteAccountDesc: Delete "{{name}}"? The associated browser data will also be removed.
accountManager.noStation: No gateway yet. Click "Add" on the top right to start.
accountManager.noAccountHint: Click "Add Account" to create one under the selected gateway.
accountManager.pickStationFirst: Pick a gateway on the left first.

loginDetection.presetLogoutHint: If the page contains "Logout", treat as logged in
loginDetection.presetLoginHint: If the page contains "Login", treat as logged out
loginDetection.customHint: Define markers for both states separately

addStationDialog.title: Add Station
addStationDialog.subtitle: Fill in a remark and the website URL. It will appear in the left list.
addStationDialog.inviteLinkPriority: Accounts will prefer the invite link for login

addAccountDialog.title: Add Account
addAccountDialog.subtitle: Create a new account under "{{name}}". The session can be reused after login.
addAccountDialog.notesPlaceholder: Use, balance, or anything worth noting.
addAccountDialog.inviteLinkPriority: Accounts will prefer the invite link for login

editStationDialog.title: Edit Station
editStationDialog.subtitle: Edit the remark and website URL.

editAccountDialog.title: Edit Account
editAccountDialog.subtitle: Edit account info for "{{name}}".
editAccountDialog.notesPlaceholder: Use, balance, or anything worth noting.
editAccountDialog.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty to clear the current password

detail.empty: Pick a gateway on the left to see its details here.
detail.noAccount: No account selected. Choose one in the middle pane to inspect it here.
detail.webviewHint: Login first tries to open an isolated WebView window so each account keeps its own session. If the runtime doesn't support it, the default browser is used as a fallback.
detail.proxyEnabledHint: When enabled, external apps can request this account via bench-auth:// protocol.

toasts.markLoggedInFailed: Failed to mark as logged in
toasts.refreshAccountFetchFailed: Could not fetch status for {{name}}, please retry
toasts.updatePasswordFailed: Account info saved, but failed to update the password
toasts.updateProxyFailed: Failed to update proxy login setting
toasts.duplicateUsername: An account with this username already exists in this gateway
toasts.importSuccess: Import complete. There are now {{stations}} gateways and {{accounts}} accounts
toasts.invalidImportFile: The import file format is invalid.
toasts.storeFailure: Failed to read or write local data.
toasts.reorderMismatch: Order could not be saved because the list changed. Please try again.
toasts.proxyLoginFailed: Proxy login failed. Please try again.
toasts.authProxyHandleFailed: Failed to handle external login request
toasts.unknown: The operation failed. Please try again.

authProxy.title: External app sign-in request
authProxy.subtitle: {{app}} requests to sign in to {{host}} using a bench account
authProxy.noMatch: No saved account for this site yet
authProxy.noMatchHint: Sign in with a new account below; bench will auto-create a group for this site and save the session.
authProxy.selectAccount: Choose an account to sign in with
authProxy.newAccountHint: Sign in fresh in an isolated window. On success it is saved and grouped under {{host}} automatically.
authProxy.proxyHint: bench signs in with this account in an isolated window (usually already signed in) and hands the result back to the external app automatically. bench never reads or stores the app's password or tokens.
authProxy.loginStarted: Sign-in started; bench will return to the external app automatically once complete (credentials are auto-filled for you to submit if a fresh login is needed)

wizard.step1Desc: Paste the sign-in URL the external app would open in your browser.
wizard.step2Desc: Choose the site and account to sign in with.
wizard.step3Desc: Review the details and start sign-in.
wizard.step1Hint: Supports bench-auth:// links and raw https authorize URLs (including loopback callbacks like http://127.0.0.1:...)
wizard.noStation: No sites available — create a station first
wizard.noAccount: No accounts available for this site
wizard.newAccountHint: Sign in fresh in an isolated window. On success it is saved and grouped under {{host}} automatically.

proxyPaste.title: Open an external sign-in link with bench
proxyPaste.description: Paste the sign-in URL the app would open in your browser (e.g. copy it from your browser's address bar). bench will run the login in the chosen account and return the result to the app. No need to set bench as the default browser.
proxyPaste.hint: Supports bench-auth:// links and raw https authorize URLs (including loopback callbacks like http://127.0.0.1:...).

externalApps.title: Authorized external apps
externalApps.subtitle: Manage external apps integrated via the bench-auth:// protocol and their bound accounts.
externalApps.revokeConfirmDescription: Revoke authorization for "{{name}}"? All account bindings will be removed.
externalApps.revokeConsequence: The external app will need to request authorization again. This cannot be undone.

quickLogin.title: ⚡ Quick Login
quickLogin.description: Enter the website URL and username to instantly open the login window. No need to create a station first.
quickLogin.attachToStation: Will be attached to the currently selected station
quickLogin.startedToast: Quick login started; session will be auto-captured after login
quickLogin.destroyOnClose: Destroy on close — delete this account after the login window is closed

authProfile.title: 🔍 Auth Profile Detection
authProfile.redetectTooltip: Open login window and complete login before re-detecting
authProfile.redetectFailed: Auth profile detection failed: please open login window and complete login first
authProfile.strategyManualOverride: ⚠ Probe strategy manually overridden. Click to reset to auto.
authProfile.notDetectedDesc: Auto-detects after login, or detect manually now

appManager.title: App Manager
appManager.summary: {{total}} apps ({{user}} user, {{system}} system, {{managed}} managed), scan took {{time}}s

appManager.browserWarning: App Manager requires a Tauri desktop environment

appManager.batchUninstallConfirmDescription: Uninstall {{count}} apps? This cannot be undone.
appManager.batchSelectedAppsLabel: The following apps will be included

appManager.installNoResults: No recommended apps match your search
appManager.installConfirmDescription: This will download and install {{name}} on your system.

softwareUpdate.searchPlaceholder: Search by app, version, or source...

empty.allUpToDate: All apps are up to date
empty.neverChecked: Updates have not been checked yet
empty.startHint: Click 'Re-check' to scan for available updates

banner.offline: Offline. Some sources skipped (brew still works).

install.doneBody: The new version has been installed.

body.queued: Waiting for the installer to start…

devIdChanged.body: The signing identity for {{app}} has changed since you installed it. Continue only if you trust the new publisher.
devIdChanged.hint: If you didn't expect this, reject the update and verify the source.

appRunning.title: App is running
appRunning.body: {{app}} is currently running and must be quit before the update can be installed.

errors.updateCheckFailed: Failed to check for available updates.

errors.noDownloadUrl: No release or download URL is available for this update.

envDetector.startHint: Click "Refresh" to scan all development tools on your system.
envDetector.autoExpandHint: Hover to expand, click to pin

portManager.title: Kill Port Processes
portManager.browserError: Cannot terminate port processes in a browser environment. Please run this as a Tauri desktop application.
portManager.emptyResults: No scan results yet. Enter port(s) above and click 'Add to Scan' to start scanning.
portManager.emptyOnly: All scanned ports are free. Click 'Show All Ports' to display them.
portManager.emptyChips: No ports selected. Enter port number(s) above to add them to the scan list.
portManager.invalidInput: Only digits, commas, and hyphens allowed
portManager.invalidPortNumber: Port must be a positive integer
portManager.rangeStartGtEnd: Start port cannot be greater than end port
portManager.portsAlreadyAdded: These ports are already in the scan list

errors.desktopOnly: Port management is only available in the desktop app.
errors.killOneFailed: Failed to free the selected port.
errors.killAllFailed: Failed to free one or more selected ports.

portManager.confirmKillPortConsequence: Running services on this port will stop immediately. Unsaved data may be lost.
portManager.confirmKillAllDescription: Terminate processes on {{count}} occupied port(s) in the scan list.
portManager.confirmKillAllConsequence: All matching services will stop immediately. Unsaved data may be lost.

devCleaner.confirmMessage: This will delete {{count}} projects and free up {{size}} of space. This action cannot be undone.

errors.desktopOnly: Scanning is only available in the desktop app.

devCleaner.noProjects: No projects found in the selected directory.

customCleanup.title: Custom Cleanup
customCleanup.confirmWarning: This will execute {{count}} cleanup command(s). Some commands may have irreversible effects. Are you sure you want to continue?

updater.title: Software Update
updater.checkingDescription: Connecting to the update service now.
updater.upToDateDescription: The currently installed Bench build is already the latest version.
updater.availableDescription: A newer Bench build is ready to download and install.
updater.downloadDescription: Fetching the update package now. Keep the app open until it finishes.
updater.installDescription: The download is complete and the installer is applying the update.
updater.readyToRestartDescription: Restart the app to switch over to the new version.
updater.desktopOnlyDescription: Updater features are only available in the desktop app.
updater.checkFailedDescription: The update service didn't return a usable result. Please try again shortly.
updater.installFailedDescription: The update package couldn't be downloaded or installed. Please try again.
updater.releaseInfoUnavailableDescription: Couldn't read the release manifest from the source. The new version may not be fully published yet, or the network may be restricted. Try again later, or check GitHub Releases for the latest publish.
updater.serviceBusyDescription: The update service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
updater.networkUnavailableDescription: The app couldn't connect to the update service just now. Please try again shortly.
updater.rateLimitedDescription: The update service is rate limiting requests for a moment. Please try again later.
updater.downloadFailedDescription: The update package download was interrupted. Please try again.
updater.signatureVerificationFailedDescription: The update package signature doesn't match the release key trusted by this app. Please verify the published artifacts.
updater.installBlockedTitle: Update can't be installed right now
updater.installBlockedDescription: The installer may be blocked by a file in use or missing permission. Close related processes and try again.
updater.updateStateChangedTitle: That update is no longer available
updater.updateStateChangedDescription: The update changed after the last check. Please check again.
updater.desktopOnly: Updater features are only available in the desktop app.

terminology.termDescription: Briefly describe what this term means...
